name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       \/ (* Philosopher i picks up right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 1
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 1
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks' = forks
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       \/ (* Philosopher i puts down left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
          /\ states' = states
       \/ (* Philosopher i puts down right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = states
       \/ (* Philosopher i goes back to thinking *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = forks
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..1]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, full, empty

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Next == 
  \/ /\ full = FALSE
     /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)
     /\ empty' = FALSE
     /\ full' = (Len(queue') = K)
  \/ /\ empty = FALSE
     /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
     /\ full' = FALSE
     /\ empty' = (Len(queue') = 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, full, empty>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

====
